headline: Moderna pays up to $2.25bn to settle drug delivery tech patent lawsuit
summary: This ends a drawn out legal battle brought by Genevant and Arbutus against Moderna under a week before the jury trial was set to begin.

headline: Reddit Traders Are Cheering Moderna While Bears Watch the Cash Burn
summary: Investors who closely watch the healthcare sector are keeping an eye on Moderna (NASDAQ:MRNA) as its shares are up 12% over the past week and 95% year-to-date, trading near $56.67 as of March 4, 2026. headline: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Slip As Strong Services Data Lifts Yields
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Thursday, Mar, 5 2026 US stock futures are pointing lower this morning, with E-mini S&P 500 contracts off about 0.4%, as investors weigh mixed signals on growth and interest rates. The ISM Services PMI for February came in at 56.1, the fastest expansion in the service sector since August 2022, which hints at solid demand for things like travel, health care and business services. At the same time, its Prices Index is still high at 63 and the 10 year...

headline: Tech Chips Lead Wall Street Rebound as Broadcom Crushes Estimates
summary: After Tuesday's Iran-driven sell-off, markets snapped back sharply on Wednesday, semiconductors led the charge, Moderna surged 16% on a $950M legal settlement, and Broadcom's after-hours results set a bullish tone for AI infrastructure heading into Thursday.

headline: Moderna (MRNA) Climbs 16% as Arbutus-Genevant Legal Battle Clears
summary: Moderna Inc. (NASDAQ:MRNA) is one of the 10 Stocks Dominating Today’s Market Action. Moderna snapped a two-day losing streak on Wednesday, jumping 15.99 percent to finish at $57.80 apiece after resolving a four-year legal dispute with two biopharmaceutical companies in relation to an alleged patent infringement of their lipid nanoparticle (LNP) delivery technology.
